projects.title: Projects
projects.inventory.title: Inventory Management System
projects.inventory.desc: A console-based application that helps small businesses track their products efficiently. Supports adding, searching, updating stock, and removing products with real-time low-stock alerts and total inventory valuation. Demonstrates practical use of arrays, functions, and structured data management — core concepts in Business Informatics.
projects.bank.title: Bank Management System
projects.bank.desc: A console-based C++ application that simulates essential banking operations. Users can open a new account with name, age, and ID verification (18+ only), deposit and withdraw funds with balance validation, and check their current balance. Each account is assigned a unique account number automatically. Demonstrates structured data management using arrays, functions, and input validation — core concepts for financial systems in Business Informatics.
projects.grades.title: Student Grade Management System
projects.grades.desc: A C++ program that digitalizes academic record management. Users can enter student names and grades, calculate class averages, rank students by performance, and identify top and bottom performers. Reflects real administrative needs in educational institutions and demonstrates strong logic-building and data processing skills.

recommendations.title: References
recommendations.toor.text: I have known Hammad Muhammad for several years as his Physics teacher. During this time, I found him to be a sincere and hardworking student with a good understanding of the subject. He is respectful, disciplined, and consistent in his efforts.
recommendations.toor.name: Prof. Chaudhry Usman Ahmad Toor
recommendations.ahmad.text: I have known Hammad Muhammad for several years as his Class In-Charge. He is a responsible and well-mannered student who takes his studies seriously. He maintains a respectful attitude toward teachers and classmates and shows good character.
recommendations.ahmad.name: Prof. Akhlaq Ahmad
